title: NoSlotHCV card database
description: Format for the card database the UI reads. SHIP THE FORMAT, NOT THE DATA: do not commit real card images, real CODE39 barcodes, or game stats. Users supply their own cards.json that follows this schema.

source.description: Free-form note about where this dataset came from (unofficial).

column_legend.description: Human-readable explanation of version/mark codes. Documentation only.

image_index.description: Map of image directory name -> human label. Image files themselves are NOT shipped.

name.description: Medal/version tag, also used as a key inside card.versions.
Display name. Real-world species names are factual. Do NOT embed copyrighted full move names; use unofficial abbreviations.

versions.description: Keyed by collector medal name. Presence means the card exists in that version.

images.description: Relative image paths like 'set-dir/file.png'. Files are user-supplied and never committed; UI shows a placeholder when missing.

barcode.description: A scan template for one source/series. Real CODE39 values are user-supplied and not committed.

template.description: CODE39 template string (<=13 chars). Sample data uses fictional placeholders.

source.description: Series/source label this barcode belongs to.

battle.description: Optional battle metadata shown in the UI.

special_move.description: UNOFFICIAL abbreviated label only (e.g. 'ドラアタ'). Never the full copyrighted move name.
